scripts.gen-icon: tauri icon public/icon.png && cp src-tauri/icons/32x32.png public/titlebar-icon.png && rm -rf src-tauri/icons/android src-tauri/icons/ios
scripts.build:app: export BUILD_NUM=$(date +%H%M) && npm run tauri -- build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --bundles app && node scripts/post-build.js
scripts.build:rmad: export BUILD_NUM=$(date +%H%M) && npm run tauri -- build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --bundles dmg && node scripts/post-build.js
scripts.build:rmud: export BUILD_NUM=$(date +%H%M) && npm run tauri -- build --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles dmg && node scripts/post-build.js
